name: Filet of Sole San Clemente
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Crab meat or 1/2 lb Shrimp meat
recipeInstructions:
1. Wipe the filet of sole well.
2. Melt 4 tablespoons butter in a small skillet and sauté mushrooms until lightly browned.
3. Remove from heat and stir in crab or shrimp meat, cracker crumbs, capers, and dill weed.
4. Spoon the mixture onto the center of the filet of sole, distributing evenly, and roll, skewering with toothpicks.
5. Place in a large skillet. Sprinkle with seasoned salt; add lemon slices, wine, and water.
6. Cover and poach for 20 minutes.
7. Remove fish filets and lemon to a heated serving platter.
8. In a small bowl, stir cornstarch into cream until smooth.
9. Add a little of the hot mixture to the beaten egg and blend in.
10. Return the egg mixture to the skillet and stir constantly until blended.
11. Serve over the fish at once.
